strengths: Extensive 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure domains
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq with MCP code generators and builder fluency
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative through founding and sustaining GISCollective, an open-source AI-adjacent platform
concerns: Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) vs. candidate name (Aisha Okonkwo), raising red flag for authenticity
No explicit mention of Master’s/PhD in AI or formal AI research, missing preferred qualification
Limited evidence of direct cloud platform strategy leadership or customer-facing AI advisory experience
response.justification: Aisha demonstrates deep technical breadth, hands-on AI-agent work, and entrepreneurial drive through GISCollective — aligning strongly with the role’s need for builder fluency and innovation. However, the severe discrepancy between the resume name and candidate name undermines credibility, and the absence of formal AI credentials or documented cloud strategy leadership is concerning. These factors outweigh the technical strengths.
